auth.title: Login or Sign up
auth.otp_sent: We sent a verification code to
auth.email_required_desc: We require a university email to ensure only verified students can submit feedback.
auth.terms_prefix: By continuing, you agree to our
auth.toast_code_sent: Check your email for the verification code!
auth.unauthorized_toast: Whoops! This page is for legends only. Log in to continue

new.meta_desc: Search and select a course to leave feedback

teaching.title: Teaching
teaching.description: How the professor teaches. Were classes engaging? Easy to follow? Were they available outside class?

assessment.title: Assessment
assessment.description: Exams, projects, grading. Was it fair? Clear? How hard was it really?

materials.title: Materials
materials.description: Slides, readings, platforms. Did they actually help you study or were they useless?

tips.title: Tips
tips.description: The stuff no one tells you. Study hacks, mistakes to avoid, or what you wish you knew before enrolling.

form.points_earn_one: You'll earn <0>+{{count}} point</0> with this feedback
form.points_earn_other: You'll earn <0>+{{count}} points</0> with this feedback
form.points_hint: Write about teaching, assessment, materials and tips to earn more, up to {{max}} points.
form.points_help: You earn 1 point just for sharing, plus more for each aspect your comment covers: teaching, assessment, materials and tips. Points count toward the giveaway.
form.terms_prefix: By submitting, you agree to our
form.comment_hint: Sharing your thoughts helps others the most! Here are some aspects to consider:
form.comment_placeholder: What should other students know? (e.g., tips for the exam, how to handle the labs...)

success.title: Thanks for contributing!
success.subtitle: Your feedback will help hundreds of students finding the right courses!!
success.recommendations_header: Want to help more? Your peers would love your feedback on these:
success.all_reviewed_desc: You've reviewed all available courses in your curriculum
success.invite_desc: You both earn 15 points when they leave their first feedback.

share.whatsapp_message: Have you used Uni Feedback? It's where we can see anonymous reviews of our courses, really handy for knowing what we're getting into. Join with my link: {{link}}
share.whatsapp_message_giveaway: Have you used Uni Feedback? It's where we can see anonymous reviews of our courses, handy for choosing. They're raffling €50 at FNAC, join with my link and add your review to enter: {{link}}
share.native_text: Anonymous reviews of our courses on Uni Feedback, they have anonymous student opinions about the courses they took!
share.native_text_giveaway: Anonymous reviews of our courses on Uni Feedback, and they're raffling €50 at FNAC!

feedback_card.earned_points_one: You earned {{count}} point for giving this feedback
feedback_card.earned_points_other: You earned {{count}} points for giving this feedback
feedback_card.no_comment: You did not leave any comment
feedback_card.delete_dialog_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this feedback? Once deleted, this feedback will be removed from the platform and will no longer be visible to other students.

edit.already_submitted: You've already submitted feedback for this course.
edit.can_update: You can update your existing feedback below.

profile.meta_desc: Manage your Uni Feedback account and preferences.
profile.points_desc: Earn points by submitting feedback and referring friends. Points unlock rewards and recognition!
profile.referral_desc: You and your friend each earn 15 points when they post their first feedback
profile.instagram_desc: Link your Instagram account and earn 20 bonus points!
profile.instagram_invalid: Invalid Instagram handle. Use only letters, numbers, dots and underscores.
profile.toast_instagram_linked: Instagram linked! You earned 20 bonus points 🎉
profile.toast_instagram_failed: Failed to update Instagram. Please try again.
profile.my_feedback_empty: You haven't submitted any feedback yet.

giveaway.prizes_raffle_desc: Raffled among all students based on their points. More points means better odds.
giveaway.prizes_referral_desc: Goes to whoever invites the most friends to contribute.
giveaway.raffle_subtitle: Each point is an entry in the draw for 2 × €50 FNAC. The more points, the better your odds. Only feedback for 2025/2026 courses and referrals made during the giveaway count, so this can differ from your total profile points.
giveaway.raffle_zero: You don't have any points yet. Submit your first feedback to start earning!
giveaway.raffle_neutral: Every detailed feedback adds points. Keep going!
giveaway.band_meaning_top1: You have more points than 99% of students
giveaway.band_meaning_top5: You have more points than 95% of students
giveaway.band_meaning_top10: You have more points than 90% of students
giveaway.band_meaning_top25: You have more points than 75% of students
giveaway.band_meaning_top50: You have more points than half the students
giveaway.next_goal_hint: Add a detailed comment to a review to climb.
giveaway.ambassador_help: One of the giveaway prizes, €50, goes to whoever invites the most friends. A friend only counts once they submit their first feedback.
giveaway.ambassador_sub_leading_one: You have {{count}} referral · {{lead}} ahead of 2nd place
giveaway.ambassador_sub_leading_other: You have {{count}} referrals · {{lead}} ahead of 2nd place
giveaway.ambassador_sub_tied_one: You have {{count}} referral · one more takes sole 1st place
giveaway.ambassador_sub_tied_other: You have {{count}} referrals · one more takes sole 1st place
giveaway.ambassador_far: Invite a friend. Every friend who joins gives you +15 points and moves you up toward 1st place.
giveaway.ambassador_pending_one: {{count}} friend signed up but hasn't given feedback yet. When they do, you earn +{{points}} points!
giveaway.ambassador_pending_other: {{count}} friends signed up but haven't given feedback yet. When they do, you earn +{{points}} points!
giveaway.upgrade_title_one: 1 review is close to full points
giveaway.upgrade_title_other: {{count}} reviews are close to full points
giveaway.upgrade_desc: Add detail about teaching, assessment, materials or tips to take each review up to 20 points.
giveaway.upgrade_none: All your reviews are already earning top points. Nice!
giveaway.upgrade_empty_desc: You haven't reviewed any 2025/2026 courses yet. Each feedback earns points toward the raffle.
giveaway.points_help: Each feedback is worth up to 20 points depending on how much detail you add.
giveaway.perfect_desc: Submit {{threshold}} feedbacks worth {{max}} points each to earn +{{bonus}} bonus points.
giveaway.instagram_desc: Follow us and link your Instagram here.
giveaway.instagram_linked: Instagram linked. You've earned +20 points. Keep following @unifeedback so it counts at the draw.
giveaway.instagram_verify_note: We'll check who's following @unifeedback before the draw. The bonus only counts if you're following.
giveaway.howto_lede: Three €50 FNAC prizes. Two ways to win, and you can do both:
giveaway.howto_path_points: Earn points and you're in the raffle for 2 prizes. Every point is one entry: more points, better odds.
giveaway.howto_path_referrals: Invite friends. Whoever refers the most wins the 3rd prize.
giveaway.race_leading_ahead_one: {{count}} referral ahead of 2nd. Keep your lead and the €50 are yours!
giveaway.race_leading_ahead_other: {{count}} referrals ahead of 2nd. Keep your lead and the €50 are yours!
giveaway.race_leading_keep: Keep your lead and the €50 are yours!
giveaway.race_far: Invite friends to climb the race.

profile.delete_account_desc: Permanently delete your account and anonymize your data. Your feedback will be preserved anonymously to help other students.
profile.delete_dialog_desc: This action cannot be undone. Your personal information will be permanently deleted, but your feedback will remain anonymous to help other students.
profile.delete_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
profile.delete_email_mismatch: Email does not match your account email
profile.toast_deleted: Your account has been deleted successfully
profile.toast_delete_failed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
